subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath strengthened His servant to serve His Cause, and enabled him to circle round His precincts and find repose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اید رضائه لخدمه امره و وفقه علی الطواف فی حوله و السکون فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
